name: Hotel OTA Platform - Project Overview
description: Decentralised hotel-owned OTA with dual coin rewards, ReZ integration, ownership mining. Phase 1 MVP built.
type: project
---

Hotel OTA platform - decentralised hotel-owned Online Travel Agency.

**Why:** Building a hotel booking platform where hotels earn equity over time via performance. Dual coin system (OTA Coin + ReZ Coin). Bangalore launch with 30 hotels.

**How to apply:** All specs are in 6 MD files (01-06) at project root. Follow

- Backend: Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL + Prisma + Redis + BullMQ
- Hotel Panel: Next.js (port 3001)
- Admin Panel: Next.js (port 3002)
- Mobile: React Native (Expo)
- Payments: Razorpay (lazy-init, dev mode returns mocks)

- API: 30+ endpoints, all Phase 1 services, zero TS errors
- Database: 16 Prisma models, seeded with 4 hotels + earn/burn rules + admin user
- PostgreSQL via Postgres.app, Redis via Homebrew
- Admin login: admin@ota.com / admin123
- Hotel staff OTP: check console in dev mode

AdBazaar is a fully independent Next.js 16 web app — a two-sided marketplace for offline ad inventory (billboards, transit, local businesses, print, influencer, unconventional).

**GitHub:** imrejaul007/adBazaar (branch: main)
**Live:** https://ad-bazaar.vercel.ap

name: AdBazaar Go-Live Checklist
description: Complete ops checklist to go live — Supabase setup, migrations, Vercel env vars, REZ backend wiring, and test flow
type: project
---

- **LIVE as of 2026-04-10**
- **Deployed at:** https://ad-bazaar.vercel.app
- **Repo:** imrejaul007/adBazaar (branch: main)
- **Build:** Passing
- **Auth:** Supabase Auth (email + password) — NOT rez-auth-service

**Why:** AdBazaar is a web marketplace with 3 roles (vendor/buyer/admin) tied to Postgres RLS. rez-auth-service is SMS OTP only and MongoDB-based — wrong fit.

---

2. Settings → API → copy 3 keys (URL, anon, service_role)
3. SQL Editor → run migrations in order:

   - `supabase/migrations/002_inquiries_messages.sql`
   - `supabase/migrations/003_missing_columns.sql`
   - `supabase/migrations/004_payout_fields.sql`
   - `supabase/migrations/005_notifications.sql`
   - `supabase/migrations/006_qr_analytics.sql`
4. Storage → New bucket → name: `listing-images` →

ADBAZAAR_WEBHOOK

```env

---

1. Vendor registers on AdBazaar → `/register`
2. Goes to `/vendor/rez-connect`
3. Enters REZ Merchant ID (from REZ Merchant App → Profile)
4. AdBazaar stores `rez_merchant_id` in Supabase `users` table
5. From now on: QR scans → REZ coins credited to consumers
6. REZ fires webhooks back → attribution table populated
7. Vendor sees full ROI at `/vendor/attribution`

---

| Decision | Choice | Why |
|----------|--------|-----|
| Auth | Supabase Auth | Web-native, email/password, RLS works automatically |
| DB | Supabase Postgres | Single DB for users + listings + bookings + attribution |
| Email | Resend (not SendGrid) | AdBazaar-specific, SendGrid is REZ backend only |
| Payments | Razorpay | Live keys needed (backend currently has test keys) |
| Storage | Supabase Storage | `listing-images` bucket, public |
| REZ bridge | webhook + rez_merchant_id | Two auth sy

| `Authorization` header type error | `const h: Record<string,string> = {}; if (t) h['Authorization'] = \`Bearer ${t}\`` |
| `params.id` not a

name: Hotel OTA + PMS Integration
description: REZ↔Hotel OTA↔Hotel PMS integration state — auth, coins, webhooks, env vars, key files, deploy URLs
type: project
---

Full integration built between three systems: REZ App, Hotel OTA (PostgreSQL/Prisma), Hotel PMS (MongoDB/Mongoose).

**Why:** REZ users need SSO into OTA and PMS, earn coins per hotel, and bookings need to sync bidirectionally.

**How to apply:** When working on any of these systems, check this memory + `docs/INTEGRATION_RUNBOOK.md`

| Service | URL | Platform |
|---------|-----|----------|
| **StayOwn (OTA frontend)** | https://hotel-ota-ota-web-five.vercel.app | Vercel |
| **OTA Admin** | https://hotel-ota-admin.vercel.app | Vercel |
| **Hotel OTA API** | https://hotel-ota-api.onrender.com (pending — deploying) | Render |
| **PMS Frontend** | https://rez-hotel-pms.onrender.com | Render Static Site |
| **PMS Alt** | https://rez-hotel-pms-1.onrender.com | Render Static Site |
| **PMS Backend** | Render Web Service (separate)

- GitHub: `imrejaul007/hotel-ota`
- Branch: `main`
- Monorepo layout: `apps/api`, `apps/ota-web`, `apps/admin`, `packages/database`

| Component | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| **PostgreSQL** | Render managed — `hotel-ota-db` (Singapore, free tier) |
| **Redis** | Upstash — shared with REZ backend (`rez-redis`, `flexible-ewe-84459.upstash.io`) |
| **OTA Frontend** | Vercel — auto-deploys on push to main |
| **OTA Admin** | Vercel — auto-deploys on push to main |
| **OTA API** | Render Web Service — root dir `apps/api`, build: `npm install && npm run build` |

```
REZ App → POST /v1/auth/rez-sso (OTA) or POST /auth/rez-sso (PMS)
       2-step: /auth/validate → /internal/auth/user/:id (x-internal-token)
       Phone normalize: "+91xxxxxxxxxx" → 10-digit

OTA → PMS: HMAC-SHA256 webhook, POST /api/v1/ota-webhooks/rez-ota
PMS → OTA: x-internal-token, POST /v1/partner/pms/coins/earn + PUT /v1/partner/pms/inventory/…
```

- OTA coin (Travel Coins): flat column on CoinWallet
- REZ coin: synced from REZ wallet service, flat column
- Hotel brand: HotelBrandCoinBalance(userId, hotelId) junction table — one row per hotel per user

Burn waterfall: OTA → REZ → Hotel brand. 40% max total discount.

| What | OTA key | PMS key |
|------|---------|---------|
| PMS→OTA calls | REZ_OTA_INTERNAL_TOKEN | REZ_OTA_INTERNAL_TOKEN |
| OTA→PMS webhook | PMS_WEBHOOK_SECRET | REZ_OTA_WEBHOOK_SECRET |
| REZ↔OTA calls | INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN | INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN |
summary: Shared Secrets (must match on both sides)

name: Hotel OTA ← REZ Integration Complete
description: REZ SSO, wallet sync, and profile unification for Hotel OTA platform
type: project
---
Hotel OTA now accepts REZ credentials for single sign-on, shares wallet balances, and unifies user profiles across the ecosystem.

**Entry Point:** `POST /v1/auth/rez-sso { rez_access_token }`

**Core Components:**
1. `RezIntegrationService` — handles all REZ API calls (auth + wallet)
2. SSO auth route — exchanges REZ JWT for OTA JWT
3. Profile sync — on-demand and automatic background sync
4. Wallet sync — background non-blocking balance updates

**Key Features:**
- No secret sharing (verification via REZ's internal API)
- Phone-based user linking (REZ JWT has no phone, OTA queries it)
- Graceful timeout handling (wallet s

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `apps/api/src/services/rez-integration.service.ts` | NEW — Core integration logic |
| `apps/api/src/routes/auth.routes.ts` | ADD `/rez-sso` endpoint |
| `apps/api/src/routes/user.routes.ts` | ADD `/rez-sync` + auto-sync on profile GET |
| `apps/api/src/routes/wallet.routes.ts` | ADD auto-sync on wallet GET |
| `apps/api/src/config/env.ts` | ADD 4 REZ vars, production validation |
| `.env.example` | ADD placeholders for REZ vars |
| `INTEGRATION_SUMMARY.md` |

```
REZ_AUTH_SERVICE_URL=https://rez-auth-service.onrender.com
REZ_WALLET_SERVICE_URL=https://rez-wallet-service-36vo.onrender.com
INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN=<shared-secret>
REZ_COIN_TO_RUPEE_RATE=0.50
```

**Why:** No secret sharing between services
**How:** Hotel OTA calls REZ's internal API to verify tokens + fetch balances

**Why:** Phone as linking key
**How:** REZ JWT has userId only, OTA queries REZ auth service to get phone

**Why:** Background wallet sync
**How:** Non-blocking async updates with 300ms timeout; respond with cached balance

**Why:** Coin-to-paise conversion in Hotel OTA
**How:** REZ wallet returns coins; OTA multiplies by COIN_TO_RUPEE_RATE * 100

Local dev:
1. `POST /v1/auth/rez-sso` with valid REZ JWT → should create/link user + return OTA JWT
2. `GET /v1/user/profile` → should have rez_coin_balance_paise synced
3. `GET /v1/wallet/` → should trigger async balance update
4. Test existing OTA user with same phone as REZ → should link without duplicate
5. Kill REZ service → should gracefully fall back to cached balance
6. `npm test` & `npm run build` must pass

Production deploy:
1. Add the 4 env vars (build fails without them)
2. No schem

- [ ] Deploy to staging, test against staging REZ services
- [ ] Update frontend (REZ app) to call new SSO endpoint
- [ ] Monitor logs for any REZ service connectivity issues
- [ ] Test deep linking from REZ → Hotel OTA (use `lastCampaignId`)
- [ ] Optional: Add webhook for real-time coin balance updates from REZ

The SSO flow deliberately avoids token federation (Hotel OTA accepting REZ JWTs directly) because it requires sharing REZ's JWT_SECRET, which violates the security principle of secret scoping. Instead, Hotel OTA acts as a client of REZ's identity + wallet APIs, verifying tokens and fetching data via authenticated internal endpoints. This keeps REZ's secret in REZ and Hotel OTA's secret in Hotel OTA.

When a REZ user wants to use Hotel OTA:
1. REZ app gets JWT via normal OTP flow
2. REZ app calls Hotel OTA: `POST /v1/auth/rez-sso { rez_access_token }`
3. Hotel OTA verifies + links + issues its own JWT
4. User is now authenticated in Hotel OTA with shared wallet

name: Rendez App — Architecture, Status & Deployment
description: Rendez standalone social/dating app — v1.0.0 complete, 30+ bugs fixed, ready to deploy. Key files, architecture decisions, and deploy instructions.
type: project
---

Rendez is a standalone REZ ecosystem partner app (social/dating). Repo: `imrejaul007/Rendez`. HEAD: `5c7af27`. Tagged `v1.0.0`.

**Why:** REZ partner app — earns coins through verified meetups, gifts, mutual attraction. Drives REZ wallet adoption through social behav

- Backend: Node.js + TypeScript + PostgreSQL (Prisma) + Redis + BullMQ — deploy to **Render** ($7/mo Web Service + $7/mo Postgres)
- Admin: Next.js — deploy to **Vercel**
- App: React Native (Expo) — EAS Build → App Store + Play Store
- Web: Expo Web (metro bundler) — deploy to **Vercel** (`npm run build:web`)
- Real-time: Socket.io on shared HTTP port, JWT auth on WS handshake
- Notifications: Firebase FCM via expo-notifications
- Media: Cloudinary

- `rendez-backend/src/` — all backend source
- `rendez-backend/prisma/schema.prisma` — DB schema
- `rendez-app/src/` — React Native app
- `rendez-app/app.config.js` — Expo config (web enabled)
- `rendez-admin/` — Next.js admin panel
- `docs/` — full documentation suite (README, architecture, api, data-model, deployment, local-dev, admin-guide)

- **Messaging state machine**: MATCHED → FREE_MSG_SENT → AWAITING_REPLY → LOCKED → GIFT_PENDING → GIFT_UNLOCKED → OPEN
- **Gift flow**: Progressive pricing (1× → 1.5× → 2×), 5/day cap, 1/pair/5min anti-spam, DB record FIRST then wallet hold
- **Meetup**: QR-only validation (no GPS), both users scan within 30 min, Redis NX lock prevents duplicate reward
- **Admin auth**: Bearer token guard via `ADMIN_API_KEY` env var
- **REZ error normalisation**: All REZ clients use shared `rezClient.ts` with ax

Build: `npm ci && npx prisma generate && npm run build`
Start: `npx prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js`

Required env vars: `DATABASE_URL`, `REDIS_URL`, `JWT_SECRET`, `REZ_PARTNER_API_URL`, `REZ_PARTNER_API_KEY`, `REZ_WEBHOOK_SECRET`, `CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME`, `CLOUDINARY_API_KEY`, `CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET`, `FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON`, `ADMIN_API_KEY`, `SENTRY_DSN` (optional)
~$14/month: Render Postgres Starter ($7) + Render Web Service Starter ($7) + Redis free tier

- `useRealtimeChat.ts`: typing timer not cleared on unmount (minor UX)
- `ProfileSetupScreen.tsx`: `parseInt('18abc')` passes age validation (client-side only)
- `MatchService.getMatches`: N+1 query pattern (2 queries per match)

name: project_rez_now_product_truth
description: REZ Now product truth — founder-level definition
type: project
originSessionId: 01c998e3-de15-4320-a25c-59f3b54ff0a6
---
REZ Now = Universal QR-based Transaction Layer for Offline Businesses.

```
Scan → Pay → Earn → Open App → Discover → Return → Repeat
```

1. **Transaction System** — entry point (scan, pay, order, book)
2. **Commerce Interface** — store layer (menu, AI chat, WhatsApp)
3. **Real-Time Interaction** — order tracking, kitchen chat, waiter call, payment kiosk
4. **Offline + Sync** — IndexedDB queue + background sync
5. **Rewards Entry** — coins on every transaction, connects to REZ App

- **REZ Now (web)** = Transaction + Interaction Layer (no install required)
- **REZ App** = Retention + Discovery Layer (wallet, coins, nearby deals)
- **REZ Merchant** = Growth + Control Layer (manage offers, track revenue)

1. Transaction
2. User ID (unified across products)
3. Wallet / Coins

- `docs/REZ_NOW_PRODUCT_TRUTH.md` — canonical product definition
- `docs/REZ_NOW_FEATURE_REFERENCE.md` — what's built
- `docs/REZ_NOW_UNIVERSAL_PLATFORM.md` — universal platform (8 business types)
- `docs/REZ_NOW_SWIPE_MACHINE_REPLACEMENT.md` — Phase R1-R4 roadmap

name: Vesper Project Overview
description: Vesper is an invite-only luxury dating app for India/international HNI market with 8 agents covering the full product
type: project
---

Vesper is a luxury, invitation-only dating and lifestyle app targeting high-net-worth individuals (HNW) in India (Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Kolkata) and internationally (Dubai, London, Singapore).

**Why:** Premium positioning — trust, exclusivity, and verification are the core brand pillars.

| Agent | Area | Priority |
|---|---|---|
| 01 | Auth, Onboarding, Verification (ID, Face, LinkedIn, Instagram, Committee) | P0 |
| 02 | Core Dating Engine — 8 PM daily drop, 5 matches/day, like/pass/super-like | P0 |
| 03 | Chat & Communication — text, voice notes, video call, disappearing msgs, screenshot protection | P0 |
| 04 | Concierge & Experiences — fine dining, travel, proposal planning, live concierge chat | P1 |
| 05 | Intimate Wellness E-Commerce Store — luxury couples products, disc

- Mobile: React Native (iOS + Android)
- Backend: Node.js (Express/Fastify) + Python (FastAPI for ML)
- DB: PostgreSQL + Redis + Elasticsearch
- Cloud: AWS ap-south-1 Mumbai (primary), Singapore (DR)
- Payments: Razorpay (India) + Stripe (international)
- Verification: AWS Rekognition (face match) + AWS Textract (ID OCR)
- Realtime: WebSockets (Socket.io)
- Push: Firebase Cloud Messaging
- Email: AWS SES / SendGrid

- Colors: Rose Gold (#D4A08C), Maroon Deep (#1A040A), Obsidian (#0B0608), Ivory (#F5EBDC)
- Fonts: Italiana (display), Cormorant Garamond (editorial), Plus Jakarta Sans (UI)
- Style: 0px border radius on cards (sharp = luxury), 0.5px hairline borders, glass morphism effects
- Button gradient: linear-gradient(180deg, #F5DCCB, #D4A08C 55%, #A06B58)

- Essence: Free — limited matches (2/week)
- Reserve: ₹9,999/mo — full matching (5/day), concierge, store discounts
- Noir: ₹29,999/mo — dedicated concierge, proposal planning, blindfold mode, Diamond verification

- Gold: Government ID + Face Match
- Platinum: Gold + LinkedIn + Committee approved
- Diamond: Platinum + Instagram + 2 member vouches + Noir subscription

- /Users/rejaulkarim/Documents/vesper/vesper-full-app.html — full HTML prototype (all screens, ~1MB)
- /Users/rejaulkarim/Documents/vesper/vesper-pitch-deck.pdf — pitch deck
- /Users/rejaulkarim/Documents/vesper/files (5)/ — 8 agent spec markdown files (agent-01 through agent-08)

- Subscriptions: ~65% of revenue
- Concierge bookings: ~18% (10–18% commission on bookings)
- E-commerce store: ~12% (30–70% margin)
- Events: ~5% (tickets + sponsorships)

- Week 16: Beta launch with Agents 01, 02, 03, 06, 08
- Week 20: Add Agents 04, 05, 07
- Week 24: Full launch
File unknown was edited 3 times this session — likely a hot path worth monitoring.
